title: PRAKTYCZNE ARKUSZE POMAGAJĄCE PRODUCENTOM W ZARZĄDZANIU RYZYKIEM ZWIĄZANYM Z BEZPIECZEŃSTWEM BIOLOGICZNYM NA FERMACH
description: Provides practical fact sheets to help poultry producers implement French biosecurity regulations and develop their own farm biosecurity plan based on risk analysis for different production systems. Developed by ITAVI within the NetPoulSafe Horizon 2020 project, these resources explain legal requirements in simple terms and include downloadable materials in French.
